<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell_command** `Get-Content -Path daily_build.bat -TotalCount 180`</summary>
```
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.3 seconds
Output:
@echo off
chcp 65001 > nul
REM ===========================================================
REM  Taiwan Industry Map - Daily Auto Rebuild
REM
REM  Pipeline (3 steps):
REM    Step 1/3: fetch_extras.py       -> ?蔭??+ ?????勗
REM    Step 2/3: fetch_company_rich.py -> ?砍?箸 + ????+ 摮? + ?∪
REM    Step 3/3: build_site.py         -> ?∪ / 瘜犖 / ??? / render 2700+ pages
REM
REM  瞍脣???:
REM    ?勗??典?獢??enriched-*.json ??
REM    C:/Users/user/Desktop/蝔???AI?∠巨蝬脤?撱箸?/reports/
REM    build_site.py ?????唬???render ??limit-up.html
REM
REM  Log: logs/build_YYYYMMDD_HHMM.log
REM  Cron: daily 14:30 (30min after market close)
REM ===========================================================
setlocal enabledelayedexpansion

REM %~dp0 = directory of this bat (with trailing backslash) - codepage-safe
set "PROJECT_DIR=%~dp0"
if "%PROJECT_DIR:~-1%"=="\" set "PROJECT_DIR=%PROJECT_DIR:~0,-1%"
set "PYTHON=C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\python.exe"
set "BUILD_SCRIPT=site\build_site.py"

REM --- Timestamp YYYYMMDD_HHMM (locale-independent via WMIC) ---
for /f "tokens=2 delims==" %%a in ('wmic OS Get localdatetime /value 2^>nul ^| find "="') do set "DT=%%a"
set "TIMESTAMP=!DT:~0,8!_!DT:~8,4!"

cd /d "%PROJECT_DIR%"
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [ERROR] Cannot cd to %PROJECT_DIR%
    pause
    exit /b 1
)

if not exist "logs\" mkdir logs

set "LOG_FILE=logs\build_!TIMESTAMP!.log"

echo ===========================================================
echo  Taiwan Industry Map - Daily Rebuild
echo  Start: %date% %time%
echo  Log:   %LOG_FILE%
echo ===========================================================
echo.

REM --- Step 1/3: fetch extras (disposal + TDCC holders weekly) ---
echo === [Step 1/3] Fetch extras (?蔭??+ ????) === > "%LOG_FILE%"
echo Start: %date% %time% >> "%LOG_FILE%"
echo. >> "%LOG_FILE%"
"%PYTHON%" "site\fetch_extras.py" >> "%LOG_FILE%" 2>&1
set "EXTRAS_RC=%errorlevel%"
if not "%EXTRAS_RC%"=="0" (
    echo [WARN] fetch_extras exit %EXTRAS_RC%, continue anyway >> "%LOG_FILE%"
)

REM --- Step 2/3: Refresh company rich data (basic/business/revenue/financials/dividends/director) ---
echo. >> "%LOG_FILE%"
echo === [Step 2/3] Refresh company rich data === >> "%LOG_FILE%"
echo Start: %date% %time% >> "%LOG_FILE%"
echo. >> "%LOG_FILE%"
"%PYTHON%" "site\fetch_company_rich.py" >> "%LOG_FILE%" 2>&1
set "RICH_RC=%errorlevel%"
if not "%RICH_RC%"=="0" (
    echo [WARN] rich refresh exit %RICH_RC%, continue to build step anyway >> "%LOG_FILE%"
)

REM --- Step 3/3: Build site (price / institutional / render 2700+ pages + limit-up from enriched-*.json) ---
echo. >> "%LOG_FILE%"
echo === [Step 3/3] Build site === >> "%LOG_FILE%"
echo Start: %date% %time% >> "%LOG_FILE%"
echo. >> "%LOG_FILE%"
"%PYTHON%" "%BUILD_SCRIPT%" >> "%LOG_FILE%" 2>&1
set "BUILD_RC=%errorlevel%"

type "%LOG_FILE%"
echo.

if %BUILD_RC% equ 0 (
    echo -----------------------------------------------------------
    echo [OK] Build completed - %date% %time%
    echo   Output: %PROJECT_DIR%\site\dist\
    echo   Log:    %LOG_FILE%
    echo -----------------------------------------------------------
) else (
    echo -----------------------------------------------------------
    echo [FAIL] Build failed, exit code: %BUILD_RC%
    echo   Check log: %LOG_FILE%
    echo -----------------------------------------------------------
)

REM --- Purge logs older than 30 days ---
forfiles /p "logs" /s /m *.log /d -30 /c "cmd /c del @file" 2>nul

REM ===========================================================
REM  Auto-deploy to Cloudflare Pages via Git
REM  Only runs when build succeeded AND git is initialized
REM  Set DEPLOY=0 at top to disable
REM ===========================================================
set "DEPLOY=1"

if %BUILD_RC% neq 0 (
    echo [SKIP] Build failed, skipping deploy
    goto :END
)
if "%DEPLOY%"=="0" goto :END

where git >nul 2>&1
if errorlevel 1 (
    echo [SKIP] git not found, skipping deploy
    goto :END
)

if not exist ".git\" (
    echo [SKIP] Not a git repo, run: git init  first
    goto :END
)

REM --- Check if there is anything to commit ---
git diff --quiet --exit-code 2>nul
set "HAS_CHANGES=%errorlevel%"
git diff --cached --quiet --exit-code 2>nul
if errorlevel 1 set "HAS_CHANGES=1"

git status --porcelain 2>nul | findstr /r "." >nul
if not errorlevel 1 set "HAS_CHANGES=1"

if "%HAS_CHANGES%"=="0" (
    echo [INFO] No changes to deploy
    goto :END
)

echo.
echo -----------------------------------------------------------
echo [DEPLOY] Auto commit and push to origin...
echo -----------------------------------------------------------
git add -A
git commit -m "auto rebuild %TIMESTAMP%" --quiet
git push origin HEAD --quiet
if errorlevel 1
... (truncated)
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell_command** `Get-Content -Path site\static\app.js -TotalCount 240`</summary>

Exit code: 0

Output:
// ????????????????????????????????????????????//   ?黎撖?- ?? autocomplete + 鈭?
//   ?舀憭?撠?嚗eader global-search + 擐? hero-search嚗?// ????????????????????????????????????????????
(function() {
  const pairs = [
    ['global-search', 'search-dropdown'],
    ['hero-search',   'hero-search-dropdown'],
  ].map(([i, d]) => [document.getElementById(i), document.getElementById(d)])
   .filter(([i, d]) => i && d);
  if (!pairs.length) return;

  let SEARCH_DATA = [];

  function waitForData(cb, tries) {
    tries = tries || 0;
    if (window.SEARCH_DATA && Array.isArray(window.SEARCH_DATA)) {
      SEARCH_DATA = window.SEARCH_DATA;
      SEARCH_DATA.forEach(it => { it._k = (it.keywords || it.label).toLowerCase(); });
      cb();
    } else if (tries < 50) {
      setTimeout(() => waitForData(cb, tries + 1), 80);
    } else {
      console.warn('SEARCH_DATA 頛?暹?');
    }
  }

  function setupSearch(input, dropdown) {
    let activeIdx = -1;
    let currentResults = [];

    function filter(q) {
      if (!q) return [];
      q = q.toLowerCase().trim();
      const tokens = q.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
      return SEARCH_DATA.filter(it =>
        tokens.every(t => it._k.includes(t))
      ).slice(0, 20);
    }

    function render(results) {
      currentResults = results;
      activeIdx = -1;
      if (!results.length) {
        dropdown.innerHTML = '<div class="search-item muted first">?曆??啁蝚衣???/div>';
        dropdown.hidden = false;
        return;
      }
      const topics = results.filter(r => r.type === 'topic');
      const companies = results.filter(r => r.type === 'company');
      const parts = [];
      if (topics.length) {
        parts.push('<div class="search-section-title">憿? / ?黎</div>');
        topics.forEach((t) => {
          parts.push(`<a class="search-item" data-href="${window.STATIC_PREFIX}${t.href}" data-idx="${results.indexOf(t)}">
            <strong>${t.label}</strong><small>${t.sub || ''}</small></a>`);
        });
      }
      if (companies.length) {
        parts.push('<div class="search-section-title">?砍 / ?</div>');
        companies.forEach((c) => {
          parts.push(`<a class="search-item" data-href="${window.STATIC_PREFIX}${c.href}" data-idx="${results.indexOf(c)}">
            <strong>${c.label}</strong><small>${c.sub || ''}</small></a>`);
        });
      }
      dropdown.innerHTML = parts.join('');
      dropdown.hidden = false;

      dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(el => {
        el.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
          e.preventDefault();
          if (el.dataset.href) window.location.href = el.dataset.href;
        });
        el.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
          dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
          el.classList.add('active');
          activeIdx = parseInt(el.dataset.idx || -1, 10);
        });
      });
    }

    let debounce;
    input.addEventListener('input', () => {
      clearTimeout(debounce);
      debounce = setTimeout(() => {
        render(filter(input.value));
      }, 80);
    });

    input.addEventListener('focus', () => {
      if (input.value) render(filter(input.value));
    });

    document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (!e.target.closest('.search-box') && !e.target.closest('.hero-search-box')) {
        dropdown.hidden = true;
      }
    });

    input.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
      if (!currentResults.length) return;
      const items = Array.from(dropdown.querySelectorAll('.search-item[data-href]'));
      if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
        e.preventDefault();
        activeIdx = Math.min(activeIdx + 1, items.length - 1);
        items.forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
        if (items[activeIdx]) items[activeIdx].classList.add('active');
      } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
        e.preventDefault();
        activeIdx = Math.max(activeIdx - 1, 0);
        items.forEach(x => x.classList.remove('active'));
        if (items[activeIdx]) items[activeIdx].classList.add('active');
      } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (items[activeIdx]) window.location.href = items[activeIdx].dataset.href;
        else if (items[0]) window.location.href = items[0].dataset.href;
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        dropdown.hidden = true;
        input.blur();
      }
    });
  }

  waitForData(() => {
    pairs.forEach(([i, d]) => setupSearch(i, d));
  });

  // 敹急??'/' ??啁洵銝??冽?撠?嚗??hero嚗?  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.
... (truncated)
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell_command** `Get-Content -Path site\templates\base.html -TotalCount 220`</summary>
```

<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh-Hant">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>{% block title %}?黎撖閔% endblock %}</title>
<meta name="description" content="?黎撖????啁?∪?憿??黎瘛勗漲鞈?摨恬?瘥瞍脰??勗???鈭箏???????????桃?嗚?>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+TC:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Source+Sans+3:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}static/logo.png">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}static/logo.png">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}static/style.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/echarts@5.4.3/dist/echarts.min.js" defer></script>
</head>
<body>

<header class="site-header">
  <div class="header-inner">
    <a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}index.html" class="logo">
      <img class="logo-mark" src="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}static/logo.png" alt="?黎撖?IndusMap">
      <span class="logo-text">
        <strong>?黎撖?/strong>
        <em>Taiwan Industry Intelligence</em>
      </span>
    </a>

    <nav class="primary-nav">
      <a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}index.html" class="{% if page=='index' %}active{% endif %}">擐?</a>
      <a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}today.html" class="{% if page=='today' %}active{% endif %}">隞?阡?</a>
      {% if has_limit_up %}<a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}limit-up.html" class="{% if page=='limit_up' or page=='limit_up_stats' %}active{% endif %}">瞍脣???</a>{% endif %}
      <a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}topics.html" class="{% if page=='topics' %}active{% endif %}">憿??”</a>
      <a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}compare.html" class="{% if page=='compare' %}active{% endif %}">憿?撠?</a>
      <a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}rankings.html" class="{% if page=='rankings' %}active{% endif %}">??璁?/a>
      <a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}rs.html" class="{% if page=='rs' %}active{% endif %}">RS 閰?</a>
      <a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}heatmap.html" class="{% if page=='heatmap' %}active{% endif %}">?Ｘ平?啣?</a>
      <a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}database.html" class="{% if page=='database' %}active{% endif %}">?砍鞈?摨?/a>
      <a href="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}ai.html" class="{% if page=='ai' %}active{% endif %}">撣閫撖?/a>
    </nav>

    <div class="search-box">
      <svg class="search-icon" width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
      <input type="text" id="global-search" placeholder="??憿??嚗?嚗PO?蝛??330嚗? autocomplete="off">
      <div class="search-dropdown" id="search-dropdown" hidden></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<main class="site-main">
  {% block content %}{% endblock %}
</main>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <span>穢 2026 ?黎撖?繚 ???弦????鞈遣霅?/span>
    <span>?敺?堆?{{ last_date }}</span>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  window.STATIC_PREFIX = "{{ static_prefix|default('') }}";
</script>
<script src="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}data/search-data.js" defer></script>
<script src="{{ static_prefix|default('') }}static/app.js" defer></script>
{% block extra_js %}{% endblock %}
</body>
</html>
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (gpt-5.5 2026-04-29 07:55:28Z)**_

以你目前這個站來看，核心是「Python 產靜態頁 → `site/dist/` → Cloudflare Pages 部署」。目前報價資料主要在 [build_site.py](</C:/Users/user/Desktop/fin ai/族群統計網頁/site/build_site.py:627>) 用 FinLab 抓 `price:收盤價 / 開盤價 / 最高價 / 最低價 / 成交量`，再把數字直接寫進 HTML。所以現在是「每日收盤後更新」，不是盤中即時。

我會建議不要把整個網站改成即時重建，而是加一層「即時報價覆蓋層」。

**推薦架構**
1. 保留現在的每日建站  
   族群分類、RS、技術圖、法人、基本面、個股頁都繼續由 FinLab + `build_site.py` 產出，這些不需要每秒重算。

2. 新增 Cloudflare Worker / Pages Function  
   做 `/api/quotes?symbols=2330,2454,3661` 這種端點。API Key 放在 Worker 環境變數，不要放前端。

3. 前端每 10 到 30 秒輪詢  
   在 `site/static/` 新增 `quotes.js`，掃描頁面上的 `data-quote-symbol`，只更新目前頁面看得到的價格、漲跌、漲跌幅、成交量、報價時間。

4. 回傳格式統一  
   不管資料源是哪一家，都先轉成同一種格式：

```json
{
  "symbol": "2330",
  "last": 1000,
  "prevClose": 990,
  "change": 10,
  "changePct": 1.01,
  "volume": 12345,
  "time": "2026-04-29T10:31:20+08:00",
  "source": "fugle",
  "delayed": false
}
```

**你可以參考的報價源**

| 報價源 | 適合程度 | 優點 | 風險 / 限制 |
|---|---:|---|---|
| **Fugle 富果行情 API** | 最推薦做 MVP | 有 REST、WebSocket、官方套件，台股支援完整，開發體驗好 | 需 API Key；免費額度有限；公開網站仍要確認授權條款 |
| **TWSE / TPEx 官方交易資訊服務** | 正式商用最穩 | 來源最正規，適合公開展示與長期營運 | 需要合約、費用、申請流程 |
| **永豐 Shioaji** | 適合個人/交易系統 | 有即時 Tick、五檔、Snapshot，Python 好整合 | 偏券商帳戶用途，不適合直接拿來公開轉發網站行情 |
| **TWSE MIS 非正式 API** | 可做測試或備援 | 免費、容易抓，常見格式如 `tse_2330.tw`、`otc_6488.tw` | 非正式穩定 API；CORS、限流、授權與轉發風險較高 |
| **Yahoo Finance / yfinance** | 只建議備援 | 便宜、容易取得國際代號 | 台股即時性與穩定性不足，不適合當主報價源 |
| **TEJ / CMoney / MoneyDJ / 資訊公司** | 適合商用 | SLA、授權、資料完整度通常較好 | 成本較高，要談規格與授權 |

我對你的站會選這個路線：**Fugle REST Snapshot + Cloudflare Worker 快取 10 秒** 先做盤中近即時更新。等流量或需求變大，再升級成 WebSocket 聚合或正式資訊商授權。這樣改動小，和你目前靜態站架構最合，也不會把整個產站流程變得很重。

參考來源：  
[Fugle 行情 API 文件](https://developer.fugle.tw/docs/data/intro/)：REST、WebSocket、資料來源說明。  
[Fugle 方案價格](https://developer.fugle.tw/docs/pricing/)：免費與付費額度。  
[TWSE 資訊服務](https://wwwc.twse.com.tw/en/products/information/information.html)：即時、延遲、盤後、歷史資料分類。  
[TWSE 即時資訊授權說明](https://www.twse.com.tw/en/products/information/stock.html)：即時資訊需簽署使用合約。  
[Shioaji 即時行情文件](https://sinotrade.github.io/zh/tutor/market_data/streaming/stocks/)：Tick / BidAsk 訂閱方式。
